twitch_info.title: I wanna kill the kamilia 3 v2.02 - The Journey to 100% (Beaten K3 v1.50 100%)

message.body: Hiya folks :D o/
it's time oml
3 raiders from lolkira24 have joined!
hiii!
good luck!
Just about to start today's grind, ty! :D
I wasn't around the last two weeks because I had an illness that made it not viable lol
i saw you go live just as i was about to end lol
decided i'd raid
lmao niiiice
BloodTrail BloodTrail BloodTrail
@Eradem aw man. hope you're doing well now
yeee :D
my ass is struggling on lunarmagic, i cant do lotus patterns for the life of me
locus patterns are the bane of my existence too dw
literally the only reason destination Len took me ages is because of locus
that's it
same for Be the San's Flandre
i quit k2 on solgryn cause of it 😭
i did go back eventually but not till much later
GOD K2 Solgryn was the WORST boss I've played because of it
that is the only lotus pattern i've done till now
I did eventually get past it but it took unreasonable amount of time
@Eradem having you do the orb phase just for a chance at the lotus is insane to me
i dont get how you're just expected to learn these patterns lmao
I'm gonna be a bit rusty today as I haven't done fangames in 2 weeks lol
just fyi
@Eradem i fully examined nader's k2 clear to get a chance at it lmao
pretty sure I did the same
man i can't wait to beat lunarmagic tho. i enjoy the boss, but im so looking forward to betty area
the K3 bug
you constantly look forward to the future rather than what you're on
K3 is always like that
actually true lmao
boss rush and later are so good
I'm still that way today
EX Air Crystal is Jail and I want out
lmao
tho im NOT excited about doruppi and influka area
esp influka area
i dont think ima enjoy that at all
what do you mean
influka area is the best part of the game
well one of the best
it looks so boring to me
not a gradius fan
coming from boshy
boshy gradius sucks
well I've never been to it, but I've been to the K2 version and it was awful
the K3 one is consistently difficult and it's kind of like with touhou once you get into a flow it's easy to just keep going
i had a much easier time in k2, but that one doesn't have ships shooting at you so it's different
@Eradem maybe it'll feel different once im there, we'll see
wont be anytime soon lmao
there is still cyber to worry about
my top bosses are stage 5 influka, hidden boss 2 (destination), Kamilia final boss, stage 4 next stage boss.
kamilia final boss is a great finale for this game
I realise that EX Emperor is the EX equivalent of that in v1.50, and it does feel that way when you beat them, but the grind of EX Emperor just sucks unlike Kamilia Final Boss.
I much prefer EX Colonel Phase 2 that was a banger.
@Eradem im actually looking forward to it
EX Colonel PHase 1 sucked though
it looks really fun, tho i only see people complain about phase 2 JinxLUL
wat
only phase 2 is fun
what are they talking about
LUL
idk lol, i hear people talking about it's difficulty often
skill issue tbh
they're right that phase 2 is very hard but its no harder than ex emperor or ex dotkid final leeks
I suppose the truth is only if you like touhou will you love phase 2 ex colonel
or like similar experiences to touhou
I think that's more accurate
@Eradem i dont know anything about touhou 💀
basically if you're a shmup player of some description, ex colonel phase 2 is fun
if you're not then it's probably complain heaven
NotLikeThis
it basically requires you to have shmup skill
so I can see why its a huge turn off
i mean i think it looks fun (kamilia phase 2), but i'll see if that thought stays the same once/if i get there
kamilia's different, its phase 2 is kinda ehhhhhh
my favourite is phase 3's ending
oh bro we are talking about different things rn
yeah I was talking about EX Colonel Phase 2.
i meant i hear people complain about kamilia's phase 2
not colonel's
JinxLUL
OHHH
if you mean kamilia phase 2 thenyeah that's fully understandable, that phase is a bit unreasonable
NotLikeThis
I think I used practice tool to figure out the attacks lmao
i haven't used practice tool
i might if i start really struggling, but ima hold off
LOCUS PATTERN HAS BEEN TEMPTING ME THOUGH
0 blame lmao
ayy one attempt to crystal corridor in nearly 20 minutes
v. nice
especially for 2 weeks off
gl CoolCat
ty CoolCat
the viewer bots have evolved
ikr
I should get my own bot that auto bans them scam bots but never bothered lol
I assume anybody who watches me isn't silly enough to follow those scam links anyway
@Eradem yeah same
i banned the word streamboo, but now it's different links and stuff
I never really liked the idea of banning random words as someone some day may say it without meaning to LUL
but if its just a simple unban its easy enough ig
@Eradem well who else is using streamboo JinxLUL
oh no I agree with that
its just on principle y'kno LUL
eventually the scammers will get you to that point
i dont ban the word usage tho, just dont send the message
ah fair
and bots normally only comment once
the people tryna get you to pay for commissions is also a problem on twitch tho 😭
NotLikeThis
lolkir1PoroSad
I feel like I'm a better player than I was 3 weeks ago
breaks do mad stuff sometimes
I dunno, I just feel more stable in my inputs if that makes sense
more deliberate
@Eradem i agree
i always feel like a better player when i spend a week away from playing
doesn't make sense, but its true i swear
31 minutes in and its my 2nd crystal corridor attempt
only 11 minutes later
very nice
eh, I think going away for a week has you realise just how much you improved from your constant grinds before
you can't realise while you're constantly grinding really
But sometimes you do genuinely improve with time away, which might be due to it being committed to long term muscle memory?
there must be a suite spot
as if you take TOO long away then you don't see improvements unless you played other similar games in that time
sweet spot*
@Eradem maybe either that, or just less burnout
yeah maybe that too
i do think there's something going on but I don't know the science lmao
just kinda refreshes your mind, without losing your skill
ye true
my mindset has changed from expecting to beat this soon to not really expecting to beat it anymore
just play it and see where it goes
I do know I'm close to beating it though
i've seen you make it to the literal last jump, you def can
seems like a pretty painful grind tho lmao
idk if i'd ever to extra stage
made it to the last jump twice iirc ye
honestly EX Air isn't that bad if you don't do the crystal
but doing the crystal, god damn
some screens look fun, but some seem torturous lmao
mainly rz to me
RZ is torturous
it took me 77 hours
SirPrise
i dont think i have the mentality to even think about trying that LOL
secret 5 took me 79 btw
LUL
so it was similar
colonel had me burnt out at 26 hours
@Eradem good thing i skipped that lmao
oh nahhhh man if you want to do ex content you need to be capable of 80+ hours easy
expect every grind to be stupidly long
@Eradem NotLikeThis
im considering maybe going back for secret 5 later, but im not sure still
don't
just don't
You have no idea how torturous it is on your mental state
it can't be that bad 😭
it is
it even made mastermaxify dream of clearing it
i mean it's not that bad
Secret 5 is that bad LUL
mental state i mean
you won't know until you spend 30+ hours in secret 5 but you will understand then
lmao
probably
it genuinely FEELS like infinity
which is funny considering its called the infinity trials
I remember when I was grinding it every night for 8 hours
it was so bad I needed people in twitch chat to support me LUL
nothing has compared to secret 5 since
not even ex rz
real i struggle too
@Eradem ok that is crazy
to me rz seems a lot worse, but ik playing secret 5 prolly feels awful too
secret 5 feels 10x worse
tho that doesn't stop me from wanting to try it eventually
secret 5 at first feels fine, you have fun, you think you're making progress
then it tears it all away from you
but i believe if you go back and dont get the secret you gotta do kamilia area again? or did i mishear
nah its at the very start of stage 5 hub
like i just wanna know if i can portal back to whatever needle/boss im on after if i dont get the secret
you can literally go to stage 5, go to left of screen
boom secret 5
@Eradem yeah im aware, i got the crystal in it
i just never grinded it
OH you mean if you go to secret 5 and don't beat it,  you need to beat influka to get to the portal hub exit to return to level select
yeah you do
@Eradem words from a broken man 😭
you don't have to replay m-stage though afaik
just beat influka and return to hub from there
I hope you don't need to beat kamilia onwards againm I've never tested it.
again,*
kamilia area*
@Eradem wait what.
you can only return to hub on a boss portal, but I don't recall influka area counting as one
it doesn't count as one
I know that when you beat influka you enter the kid house which has a return to hub save point you can press W on instead of save to enter m-stage
so yeah id have to do kamilia area again if i go back and dont get the secret
if you just hit W on it instread you go to hub
just don't use the save point after beating influka area since that'd make you get stuck in m-stage lmao
im not gonna remember any of this once i get there ngl 😭
I'd leave secret 5 until you got nothing left to grind, that's what most players do
I'm different since I locked myself into secret 5 the moment it was accessible
I remember tears of joy when I beat secret 5 LUL
JinxLUL
the only time I've ever cried beating something in a fangame LUL
i'll just see where the game takes me
if im stuck on a boss for too long, i might go back for it
oh yeah, are you able to go back to it and not lose progress for as long as you haven't beaten stage 5?
i wanna go do all secrets actually, i just think getting secret 5 first would be nice so i dont have to do every screen
welllllll only if you get secret 5 item in k3 v2.00+ do you get to pick specific screens
@Eradem im not really sure and that's why im worried about going back
if you obtain it in v1.50 and move to v2.00 you can do that, but in v1.50 you had to play whole stages again
i am on 2.02 tho
ah in that case secret 5 is an amazing item
unlike v1.50 where it sucked
one really cool feature of secret 5 item in v2.00+
is you can click a stage portal to go straight into the secret area
I'm not sure if you need the secret first or to have beaten the secret entrance first though
But yeah cool feature
i saw it, it's cool
i think if i did the secrets, i'd try 5 first, then the rest in order
feels backwards considering the rest are so much easier LUL
maybe once i get to cyber i'll go back
@Eradem get the hardest out of the way first so you dont worry later 🙏
problem is
the skill you get from beating 5 won't help you with the others before it
its a phenomenon that you get good at secret 5, but it doesn't make you better at other things
i never played k3 without the autofire for bosses, gotta get that s2 one Kappa
does getting good at other things make me better at secret 5?
Lmao
also it sounds like they buffed s5 item? nice
tbf no
nothing helps with secret 5 LUL
well general needle skill helps if you played a lot of needle
and yeah they have Allen, let you pick your individual screens in stages
makes a difference ofc
and let you go straight to secret areas etc
thats pretty nice
secret 5 in v1.50 was just pure worthless imo
at least once you got redire practice tool it was XD
at least the v2.02 version is actually decent
something like secret 3 or 4 you are fine getting a lot later its whatever secret 1 too
@Eradem so then it doesn't really matter what order i choose then, does it JinxLUL
but unless you like mashing id do secret2 at least for first playthough
secret 5 as first secret is still on the table
iirc you need secret 2 item to be able to beat hidden boss 4 really, cause of the way the burst shots from autofire help out
but you need secret 4 to even unlock that boss
so w/e LUL
@Eradem oh yea well i didnt have this so it was useful
yeah
you can mash for gravity man but it is pretty awful, for most people
extremely awful
I couldn't do it
LUL
had to use autofire item
what is this right now btw just regular ex stages or is there something new here?
But I do remember being hugely disappointed at secret 5 item in v1.50 because even without practice tool it didn't feel useful to me.
EX Air Crystal, the hardest platforming in the game before EX M-Stage according to Pluto
oh there is a new crystal here huh, ok
yeah it's really nasty
got a tricky two really tight jumps in it
its in the middle of the screen where the bricks are
you enter it from the super F area
and then you exit at the bottom right of this screen
ah some secret room in the wall then
ye
it has an easy jump first, then a nasty M jump
and then a really nasty two perfect jumps thingy
and then you gotta backtrack the bottom of the screen from bottom right back into super F area again
and then on top of that beat the two super Fs at the end lmao
hate mistiming the double diagonal lmao
alright yea i looked at whats in the wall on a vid
pretty long save, already was
at least it seems like there was no new crystal on ex RZ or anything like that Kappa
yeah no fortunately
EX Prism, EX Hope The End Of, EX Air
those were the new EX crystals
and then we have a Golden Crystal for Stages 1-4 which means beat them under a certain amount of deaths
and that was it for new crystals before EX M-Stage which has the last 3.
i looked at the prism one wtf is that LUL
ikr
bruh tough crystal right there Kappa
just type in "Kill The Kamilia" and done
so easy
Hope The End OF is annoying though
it has hidden spikesd
a lot of them
I don't know what it looks like though.
yo what the fuck why is the twitch stream provider capping me out at low kb/s now
time to switch stream server lol
ah but hope the end of you can go back to save it seems dont have to do screen 1 screen2 again
